For You is nāʾeh ʾăd̲ōnāy ʾĕlōhênûוֵא fitting, Adonai our God wēlōhê ʾab̲ôt̲ênû šîrוּשְׁבָחָההַלֵּלוְזִמְרָה and God of our ances- ûšəb̲āḥâ hallēl wəzim-עֹזוּמֶמְשָׁלָהנֶֽצַח tors, song and exalta- râ ʿōz ûmemšālâ neṣaḥגְּדֻלָּהוּגְבוּרָהתְּהִלָּה tion, praise and melody , gəd̲ullâ ûg̲əb̲ûrâ təhillâוְתִפְאֶֽרֶתקְדֻשָּׁה might and power, wət̲ip̲ʾeret̲ qəd̲uššâוּמַלְכוּתבְּרָכ eminence, greatness, ûmalk̲ût̲ bərāk̲ôt̲וְה strength, praise, glory , wəhôd̲āʾôt̲ mēʿattâוְעַד־ע holiness, sovereignty , wəʿad̲–ʿôlām blessings and thanks from now and for all eternity . Blessed are You, Adonai, bārûk̲ ʾattâ ʾăd̲ōnāy ʾēlבָּרוּ divine Sovereign worthy melek̲ gād̲ôl battišbāḥôt̲מֶֽלֶ of praise and thanksgiv- ʾēl hahôd̲āʾôt̲ ʾăd̲ôn han-אֵלהַה ing, Master of wonders nip̲lāʾôt̲ habbôḥēr bəšîrêהַנִּפְלָא who choses melodious zimrâ melek̲ ʾēl ḥêבְּשִׁירֵיזִמְרָהמֶֽלֶ songs, Royal God who hāʿôlāmîmחֵיהָע endures forever. It happened at ûb̲ək̲ēn wayhî baḥăṣîבַּחֲצִי וַיְהִי וּבְכֵן midnight: hallaylâ .הַלַּֽיְלָה You brought about ʾāz rôb̲ nissîm hip̲lēt̲āהִפְלֵאתָ נִסִּים רז אָ many miracles ballaylâ At the beginning of the bərōš ʾašmûrôt̲ zehזֶהאַשְׁמוּר רֹאשׁ בְּ watches on this night hallaylâ .הַלַּיְלָה You brought victory to gēr ṣed̲eq niṣṣaḥtôכְּנֶחֱלַק נִצַּחְתּ צֶדֶק רגֵּ [Abraham,] the righ- kəneḥĕlaq lôל teous convert,

exactText: הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 71הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 71הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 71 in the middle of the laylâ .לַיְלָה night. wayhî baḥăṣî hallaylâ You passed judgment on dantā melek̲ gərārבַּחֲל גְּרָר מֶלֶ נְתָּ דַּ the king of Gerar in a baḥălôm dream of night hallaylâ .הַלַּיְלָה You frightened [Laban] hip̲ḥad̲tā ʾărammîבְּאֶמֶשׁ אֲרַמִּי פְחַדְתָּ הִ the Aramean bəʾemeš “last night." laylâ .לַיְלָה Israel fought with God wəyiśrāʾēl yāśar lāʾēlלָאֵל יָשַׂר יִשְׂרָאֵל וְ and prevailed over him wayyûk̲al lôלוַיּוּכַל at night. laylâ .לַיְלָה wayhî baḥăṣî hallaylâ You crushed the first- zeraʿ bək̲ôrê p̲at̲rôsפַתְר בְּכ רַע זֶ born of Pathros [Egypt] māḥaṣtā baḥăṣîבַּחֲצִי מָחַצְתָּ at midnight. hallaylâ .הַלַּיְלָה They did not find their ḥēyəlām lōʾ māṣəʾûמָצְאוּ לֹא יְלָם חֵ host when they rose bəqûmāmבְּקוּמָם at night. ballaylâ .בַּלַּיְלָה You defeated the prince ṭissat̲ nəg̲îd̲ ḥărôšet̲חֲר נְגִיד סַּת טִ of Harosheth (Sisera) sillît̲ā bək̲ôk̲əb̲êבְּכ סִלִּיתָ with the stars of night. laylâ .לַיְלָה wayhî baḥăṣî hallaylâ You dried up the yāʿaṣ məḥārēp̲ lənôp̲ēp̲אִוּוּי לְנ מְחָרֵף עַץ יָ corpses of the blasphe- ʾiwwûy hôb̲aštāפְגָרָיו ה mer [Sennacherib] who p̲əg̲ārāyw plotted to rise up against Zion at night. ballaylâ .בַּלַּיְלָה

exactText: הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 74הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 74הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 74 You revealed to gillît̲ā ləʾezrāḥî ḥăṣôt̲ lêlחֲצ לְאֶזְרָחִי לִּיתָ גִּ the Ezrahite [Abraham]לֵיל [that which would oc- cur] at midnight on Passover. pesaḥ .פֶּסַח You shall say: “The waʾămartem zeb̲aḥ .פֶּֽסַח זֶֽבַח וַאֲמַרְתֶּם Passover sacrifice. ” pesaḥ You knocked on his dəlāt̲āyw dāp̲aqtāכְּח דָּפַקְתָּ לָתָיו דְּ [Abraham's] door in the kəḥôm hayyômהַיּ heat of the day on Passover. bappesaḥ .בַּפֶּסַח He fed the lumi- hisʿîd̲ nôṣăṣîm ʿug̲ôt̲עֻג נסְעִיד הִ nous [angels] loaves of maṣṣôt̲מַצּ matzah on Passover. bappesaḥ .בַּפֶּסַח He ran to the cattle, wəʾel habbāqār rāṣזֵכֶר רָץ הַבָּקָר אֶל וְ which are reminiscent zēk̲er ləšôr ʿerek̲עֶרֶ לְשׁ of the ox about which we read on Passover. pesaḥ .פֶּסַח You shall say: “The waʾămartem zeb̲aḥ .פֶּֽסַח זֶֽבַח וַאֲמַרְתֶּם Passover sacrifice. ” pesaḥ Your wrath was un- zôʿămû səd̲ômîmוְל סְד żז leashed on the inhab- wəlôhāṭû bəʾēšבְּאֵשׁ itants of Sodom, who were burned by fire on Passover. pesaḥ .פֶּסַח Lot escaped from them ḥullaṣ lôṭ mēhem û-וּמַצּ מֵהֶם ללַּץ חֻ and baked matzah at maṣṣôt̲ ʾāp̲â bəqēṣבְּקֵץ אָפָה the end of Passover. pesaḥ .פֶּסַח

exactText: הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 75הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 75הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 75 You destroyed the ṭēṭēt̲ā ʾad̲mat̲ môp̲מאַדְמַת אטֵאתָ טֵ land of Moph and wənôp̲ bəʿob̲rək̲āבְּעׇבְרְ וְנ Noph [Egypt] when you passed through on Passover. bappesaḥ .בַּפֶּסַח You shall say: “The waʾămartem zeb̲aḥ .פֶּֽסַח זֶֽבַח וַאֲמַרְתֶּם Passover sacrifice. ” pesaḥ Yah, You crushed the yāh rōš kol ʾôn māḥaṣtāמָחַצְתָּ אכׇּל רֹאשׁ הּיָ all the first of their šimmûrשִׁמּוּר strength on the night of the observance of Passover. pesaḥ .פֶּסַח Mighty One, You passed kabbîr ʿal bēn pāsaḥtāפָּסַחְתָּ בֵּן עַל בִּיר כַּ over the son [Israel, bəd̲amבְּדַם whose houses were marked] with the blood of the lamb of Passover pesaḥ .פֶּסַח so as not to allow the ləb̲iltî tēt̲ mašḥît̲ lāb̲ōʾמַשְׁחִית תֵּת בִלְתִּי לְ Destroyer to enter my b̲ip̲t̲āḥayבִפְתָחַי לָבֹא doorways on Passover. bappesaḥ .בַּפֶּסַח You shall say: “The waʾămartem zeb̲aḥ .פֶּֽסַח זֶֽבַח וַאֲמַרְתֶּם Passover sacrifice. ” pesaḥ The enclosed [city of məsuggeret̲ suggārâבְּעִתּ סֻגָּרָה סֻגֶּרֶת מְ Jericho] was closed at bəʿittôt̲ê the time of Passover. pesaḥ .פֶּסַח Midian was destroyed nišməd̲â mid̲yān biṣlîlבִּצְלִיל מִדְיָן שְׁמְדָה נִ by a cake of barley śəʿôrê ʿômērעשְׂע from the omer-offering of Passover. pesaḥ .פֶּסַח

exactText: הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 76הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 76הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 76 The fat of Pul and Lud śôrāp̲û mašmannê p̲ûlפוּלמַשְׁמַנֵּי żשׂ [Assyria] was burned by wəlûd̲ bîqad̲ yəqôd̲יְק בִּיקַד וְלוּד a fire kindled on Passover. pesaḥ .פֶּסַח You shall say: “The waʾămartem zeb̲aḥ .פֶּֽסַח זֶֽבַח וַאֲמַרְתֶּם Passover sacrifice. ” pesaḥ Still on this day , he ʿôd̲ hayyôm bənôb̲ laʿă-לַעֲמ בְּנ הַיּ żע [Sennacherib] stood at môd̲ ʿad̲ gāʿâ ʿônat̲עגָּעָה עַד Nob until the arrival of the season of Passover. pesaḥ .פֶּסַח The hand wrote, en- pas yād̲ kot̲b̲â ləqaʿăqēaʿלְקַעֲקֵעַ כׇּתְבָה יָדס פַּ graving deeply , ṣûlצוּל on Passover. bappesaḥ .בַּפֶּסַח Let the watchmen ṣāp̲ōh haṣṣāp̲ît̲ ʿārôk̲עָר הַצָּפִית פֹה צָ watch!” “Set the table!”- haššulḥānהַשֻּׁלְחָן -- on Passover. bappesaḥ .בַּפֶּסַח You shall say: “The waʾămartem zeb̲aḥ .פֶּֽסַח זֶֽבַח וַאֲמַרְתֶּם Passover sacrifice. ” pesaḥ Hadassah assembled the qāhāl kinsâ hăd̲assâהֲדַסָּה כִּנְסָה הָל קָ people to fast for three ləšalleš ṣômצלְשַׁלֶּשׁ days on Passover. bappesaḥ .בַּפֶּסַח You crushed the roof rōš mibbêt̲ rāšāʿ māḥaṣ-רָשָׁע מִבֵּית אשׁרֹ of the wicked one's tā bəʿēṣ ḥămiššîmחֲמִשִּׁים בְּעֵץ מָחַצְתָּ [Haman's] house with a fifty-[cubit] stake on Passover. bappesaḥ .בַּפֶּסַח Cause these two things šətê ʾēlleh reg̲aʿ tāb̲îʾתָּבִיא רֶגַע אֵלֶּה תֵּי שְׁ to happen to the Utsite ləʿûṣît̲לְעוּצִית [Edom] on Passover. bappesaḥ .בַּפֶּסַח

exactText: הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 77הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 77הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 77 May Your hand be tāʿôz yād̲ək̲ā tārûmיְמִינֶ תָּרוּם יָדְ עתָּ strengthened, may Your yəmînek̲ā kəlîl hit̲qad-חַג הִתְקַדֵּשׁ כְּלִיל right hand be mightily dēš ḥag̲ exalted, as on the night of the holy festival of Passover. pesaḥ .פֶּסַח You shall say: “The waʾămartem zeb̲aḥ .פֶּֽסַח זֶֽבַח וַאֲמַרְתֶּם Passover sacrifice. ” pesaḥ Because it is proper for kî lô nāʾehכִּיל Him, because it befits Him. kî lô yāʾehכִּיל Mighty in sovereignty , ʾaddîr bimlûk̲âדִּירבִּמְלוּכָה אַ rightly select. bāḥûr kahălāk̲âחוּרכַּהֲלָכָה בָּ His minions say to Him: gəd̲ûd̲āyw yōmərû lôדוּדָיויֹאמְרוּל גְּ Yours and Yours, lək̲ā ûlək̲āלְ Yours because it is lək̲ā kî lək̲āלְ Yours, Yours and only Yours--- lək̲ā ʾap̲ lək̲āלְ Yours, Adonai, is lək̲ā ʾăd̲ōnāyלְ sovereignty!” hammamlāk̲â Because it is proper for kî lô nāʾehכִּיל Him, because it befits Him. kî lô yāʾehכִּיל Exalted in sovereignty , dag̲ûl bimlûk̲âגוּלבִּמְלוּכָה דַּ rightly glorious. hād̲ûr kahălāk̲âדוּרכַּהֲלָכָה הָ His faithful ones say to wāt̲îqāyw yōmərû lôתִיקָיויֹאמְרוּל וָ Him: “Yours and Yours, lək̲ā ûlək̲āלְ Yours because it is lək̲ā kî lək̲āלְ Yours, Yours and only Yours--- lək̲ā ʾap̲ lək̲āלְ

exactText: הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 78הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 78הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 78 Yours, Adonai, is lək̲ā ʾăd̲ōnāyלְ sovereignty!” hammamlāk̲â Because it is proper for kî lô nāʾehכִּיל Him, because it befits Him. kî lô yāʾehכִּיל Blameless in zakkay bimlûk̲âכַּאיבִּמְלוּכָה זַ sovereignty , rightly powerful. ḥāsîn kahălāk̲âסִיןכַּהֲלָכָה חָ His generals say to Him: ṭap̲sərāyw yōmərû lôפְסְרָיויֹאמְרוּל טַ Yours and Yours, lək̲ā ûlək̲āלְ Yours because it is lək̲ā kî lək̲āלְ Yours, Yours and only Yours--- lək̲ā ʾap̲ lək̲āלְ Yours, Adonai, is lək̲ā ʾăd̲ōnāyלְ sovereignty!” hammamlāk̲â Because it is proper for kî lô nāʾehכִּיל Him, because it befits Him. kî lô yāʾehכִּיל Singular in sovereignty , yāḥîd̲ bimlûk̲âחִידבִּמְלוּכָה יָ rightly strong. kabbîr kahălāk̲âבִּירכַּהֲלָכָה כַּ His learned ones say to limmûd̲āyw yōmərû lôמּוּדָיויֹאמְרוּל לִ Him: “Yours and Yours, lək̲ā ûlək̲āלְ Yours because it is lək̲ā kî lək̲āלְ Yours, Yours and only Yours--- lək̲ā ʾap̲ lək̲āלְ Yours, Adonai, is lək̲ā ʾăd̲ōnāyלְ sovereignty!” hammamlāk̲â Because it is proper for kî lô nāʾehכִּיל Him, because it befits Him. kî lô yāʾehכִּיל

exactText: הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 79הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 79הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 79 Exalted in sovereignty , mārôm bimlûk̲âרמָ rightly awesome. nôrāʾ kahălāk̲âżנ Those who surround səb̲îb̲āyw yōmərû lôבִיבָיויֹאמְרוּל סְ Him say to Him: “Yours and Yours, lək̲ā ûlək̲āלְ Yours because it is lək̲ā kî lək̲āלְ Yours, Yours and only Yours--- lək̲ā ʾap̲ lək̲āלְ Yours, Adonai, is lək̲ā ʾăd̲ōnāyלְ sovereignty!” hammamlāk̲â Because it is proper for kî lô nāʾehכִּיל Him, because it befits Him. kî lô yāʾehכִּיל Humble in sovereignty , ʿānāyw bimlûk̲âנָיובִּמְלוּכָה עָ rightly saving. pôd̲eh kahălāk̲âżפּ His righteous ones say ṣaddîqāyw yōmərû lôדִּיקָיויֹאמְרוּל צַ to Him: “Yours and Yours, lək̲ā ûlək̲āלְ Yours because it is lək̲ā kî lək̲āלְ Yours, Yours and only Yours--- lək̲ā ʾap̲ lək̲āלְ Yours, Adonai, is lək̲ā ʾăd̲ōnāyלְ sovereignty!” hammamlāk̲â Because it is proper for kî lô nāʾehכִּיל Him, because it befits Him. kî lô yāʾehכִּיל Holy in sovereignty , qād̲ôš bimlûk̲âדקָ rightly merciful. raḥûm kahălāk̲âחוּםכַּהֲלָכָה רַ His multitudes say to šinʾannāyw yōmərû lôנְאַנָּיויֹאמְרוּל שִׁ Him: “Yours and Yours, lək̲ā ûlək̲āלְ

exactText: הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 80הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 80הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 80 Yours because it is lək̲ā kî lək̲āלְ Yours, Yours and only Yours--- lək̲ā ʾap̲ lək̲āלְ Yours, Adonai, is lək̲ā ʾăd̲ōnāyלְ sovereignty!” hammamlāk̲â Because it is proper for kî lô nāʾehכִּיל Him, because it befits Him. kî lô yāʾehכִּיל Strong in sovereignty , taqîp̲ bimlûk̲âקִיףבִּמְלוּכָה תַּ rightly supportive. tômēk̲ kahălāk̲âżתּ His perfect ones say to təmîmāyw yōmərû lôמִימָיויֹאמְרוּל תְּ Him: “Yours and Yours, lək̲ā ûlək̲āלְ Yours because it is lək̲ā kî lək̲āלְ Yours, Yours and only Yours--- lək̲ā ʾap̲ lək̲āלְ Yours, Adonai, is lək̲ā ʾăd̲ōnāyלְ sovereignty!” hammamlāk̲â Because it is proper for kî lô nāʾehכִּיל Him, because it befits Him. kî lô yāʾehכִּיל Next year in Jerusalem! ləššānâ habbāʾâלְשָּׁנָההַבָּאָה bîrûšālāyimבִּירוּשָׁלָיִם Blessed are You, Adonai bārûk̲ ʾattâ ʾăd̲ōnāyבָּרוּ our God, Sovereign of ʾĕlōhênû melek̲ hāʿôlāmאֱ the universe, creator of bôrēʾ pərî haggāp̲enבּ the fruit of the vine.

exactText: הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 81הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 81הַלֵּל Songs of Praise 81 Blessed are You, Adonai bārûk̲ ʾattâ ʾăd̲ōnāyבָּרוּ our God, Sovereign of ʾĕlōhênû melek̲ hāʿôlāmאֱ the universe, for the ʿal haggep̲en wəʿalעַלהַגֶּֽפֶןוְעַל vine and for the fruit of pərî haggep̲en wəʿalפְּרִיהַגֶּֽפֶןוְעַל the vine, for the pro- tənûb̲at̲ haśśād̲eh wəʿalתְּנוּבַתהַשָּׂדֶהוְעַל duce of the field, and ʾereṣ ḥemdâ ṭôb̲âאֶֽרֶץחֶמְדָּהט for the beloved, good, ûrəḥāb̲â šerāṣît̲ā wəhin-וּרְחָבָהשֶׁרָצִֽיתָ and broad land that you ḥaltā laʾăb̲ôt̲ênû leʾĕk̲ôlוְהִנְחַֽלְתָּלַאֲב desired and bequeathed mippiryāh wəliśbôaʿלֶאֱכ to our ancestors so that miṭṭûb̲āhמִטּוּבָהּ they could eat of its fruit and be sated with its goodness. Have mercy , Adonai our raḥēm ʾăd̲ōnāy ʾĕlōhênûרַחֵםיְהוָהאֱ God, on Your people ʿal yiśrāʾēl ʿammek̲āיִשְׂרָאֵלעַמֶּֽ Israel, on Your city Jerusalem, wəʿal yərûšālayim ʿîrek̲āוְעַליְרוּשָׁלַֽיִםעִירֶֽ on Zion, the dwelling- wəʿal ṣiyyôn miškanוְעַלצִיּ place of Your Glory , kəb̲ôd̲ek̲āכְּב on Your altar, wəʿal mizbaḥăk̲āוְעַלמִזְבַּחֲ and on Your temple. wəʿal hêk̲ālek̲āוְעַלהֵיכָלֶֽ Rebuild the holy city ûb̲ənēh yərûšālayimוּבְנֵהיְרוּשָׁלַֽיִםעִיר of Jerusalem speedily in ʿîr haqqōd̲eš bimhērâהַקֹּדֶשׁבִּמְהֵרָהבְּיָמֵֽינוּ our days, bəyāmênû bring us to it, wəhaʿălēnû lət̲ôk̲āhוְהַעֲלֵֽנוּלְת and let us rejoice in it. wəśamməḥēnû b̲āhוְשַׂמְּחֵֽנוּבָהּ Then we will eat of its wənōk̲al mippiryāhוְנֹאכַלמִפִּרְיָהּ fruit and be sated with its wəniśbaʿ miṭṭûb̲āhוְנִשְׂבַּעמִטּוּבָהּ goodness, and we will bless You ûnəb̲ārek̲k̲ā ʿālêhāוּנְבָרֶכְ for it in holiness and biqd̲uššâ wəb̲əṭohŏrâוְבְטׇהֳרָה purity .

exactText: נִרְצָה Concluding Songs 82נִרְצָה Concluding Songs 82נִרְצָה Concluding Songs 82 May it be your will to On Shabbat b̲b̲t̲ ûrəṣēh wəhaḥăliṣēnû On Shabbat: בְּי וְהַחֲלִצֵֽנוּ וּרְצֵה strengthen us on this bəyôm haššabbāt̲הַזֶּה הַשַּׁבָּת Sabbath day . hazzehוְשַׂמְחֵֽנוּבְּי Let us rejoice on this wəśamḥēnû bəyôm ḥag̲הַמַּצּ festival of Matzot. hammaṣṣôt̲ hazzeh For You, Adonai, are kî ʾattâ ʾăd̲ōnāy ṭôb̲כִּיאַתָּהיְהוָהט good and do good for ûmēṭîb̲ lakkōlוּמֵטִיבלַכֹּל everyone, and we thank You for wənôd̲eh lək̲ā ʿal hāʾāreṣוְנ the land and for the wəʿal pərî haggāp̲enוְעַלפְּרִיהַגָּֽפֶן fruit of the vine. He is glorious. hād̲ûr hûʾדוּרהוּא הָ He is just. wāt̲îq hûʾתִיקהוּא וָ He is blameless. zakkay hûʾכַּאיהוּא זַ He is righteous. ḥāsîd̲ hûʾסִידהוּא חָ May He rebuild His yib̲neh b̲êt̲ô bəqārôb̲יִבְנֶהבֵית temple soon! He is pure. ṭāhôr hûʾהטָ He is singular. yāḥîd̲ hûʾחִידהוּא יָ He is powerful. kabbîr hûʾבִּירהוּא כַּ He is learned. lāmûd̲ hûʾמוּדהוּא לָ He is Sovereign. melek̲ hûʾלֶ מֶ He is radiant. nāʾôr hûʾאנָ He is strong. saggîb̲ hûʾגִּיבהוּא סַ He is valorous. ʿizzûz hûʾזּוּזהוּא עִ He is salvific. pôd̲eh hûʾżפּ He is just. ṣaddîq hûʾדִּיקהוּא צַ May He rebuild His yib̲neh b̲êt̲ô bəqārôb̲יִבְנֶהבֵית temple soon!

exactText: נִרְצָה Concluding Songs 86נִרְצָה Concluding Songs 86נִרְצָה Concluding Songs 86 May it be Your will, yəhî rāṣôn milləp̲ānêk̲āיְהוָה מִלְּפָנֶי רָצ יְהִי Adonai our God and ʾăd̲ōnāy ʾĕlōhênû wēlōhêאֲבוֵאאֱ God of our ancestors, ʾăb̲ôt̲ênû šeyyibbānehהַמִּקְדָּשׁ בֵּית שֶׁיִּבָּנֶה that the temple be bêt̲ hammiqdāš bimhērâוְתֵן בְיָמֵינוּ בִּמְהֵרָה rebuilt speedily in our b̲əyāmênû wət̲ēn .בְּת חֶלְקֵנוּ days, and may You ḥelqēnû bət̲ôrāt̲ek̲ā grant us a portion in Your Torah. exactText: נִרְצָה Concluding Songs 92נִרְצָה Concluding Songs 92נִרְצָה Concluding Songs 92 Two are the tablets of šənê luḥôt̲ habbərît̲שְׁנֵילֻח the covenant One is our God in the ʾeḥād̲ ʾĕlōhênû šebbaššā-אֶחָדאֱ heavens and the earth. mayim ûb̲āʾāreṣוּבָאָרֶץ One little goat, one ḥad̲ gad̲yāʾ ḥad̲ gad̲yāʾחַדגַּדְיָאחַדגַּדְיָא little goat that my father bought dizb̲an ʾabbāʾ bit̲rê zûzêדִּזְבַןאַבָּאבִּתְרֵיזוּזֵי for two zuzim. One little goat, one ḥad̲ gad̲yāʾ ḥad̲ gad̲yāʾחַדגַּדְיָאחַדגַּדְיָא little goat A cat came wəʾăt̲āʾ šûnərāʾוְאֲתָאשׁוּנְרָא and ate the goat wəʾāk̲al ləg̲ad̲yāʾוְאָכַללְגַדְיָא that my father bought dizb̲an ʾabbāʾ bit̲rê zûzêדִּזְבַןאַבָּאבִּתְרֵיזוּזֵי for two zuzim. One little goat, one ḥad̲ gad̲yāʾ ḥad̲ gad̲yāʾחַדגַּדְיָאחַדגַּדְיָא little goat A dog came wəʾăt̲āʾ kalbוְאֲתָאכַּלְבּא and bit the cat wənāšak̲ ləšûnərāʾוְנָשַׁ that at the goat dəʾāk̲al ləg̲ad̲yāʾדְּאָכַללְגַדְיָא that my father bought dizb̲an ʾabbāʾ bit̲rê zûzêדִּזְבַןאַבָּאבִּתְרֵיזוּזֵי for two zuzim. exactText: נִרְצָה Concluding Songs 93נִרְצָה Concluding Songs 93נִרְצָה Concluding Songs 93 A fire came wəʾăt̲āʾ nûrāʾוְאֲתָאנוּרָא and burned the stick wəšārap̲ ləḥûṭərāʾוְשָׁרַףלְחוּטְרָא that bit the dog dəhikkâ lək̲albāʾדְּהִכָּהלְכַלְבָּא that bit the cat dənāšak̲ ləšûnərāʾדְּנָשַׁ that at the goat dəʾāk̲al ləg̲ad̲yāʾדְּאָכַללְגַדְיָא that my father bought dizb̲an ʾabbāʾ bit̲rê zûzêדִּזְבַןאַבָּאבִּתְרֵיזוּזֵי for two zuzim. exactText: נִרְצָה Concluding Songs 94נִרְצָה Concluding Songs 94נִרְצָה Concluding Songs 94 A butcher came wəʾăt̲āʾ haššôḥēṭוְאֲתָאהַשּׁ and slaughtered the ox wəšāḥaṭ lət̲ôrāʾוְשָׁחַטלְת that drank the water dəšāt̲āʾ ləmayyāʾדְּשָׁתָאלְמַיָּא that put out the fire dək̲āb̲â lənûrāʾדְּכָבָהלְנוּרָא that burned the stick dəśārap̲ ləḥûṭərāʾדְּשָׂרַףלְחוּטְרָא that bit the dog dəhikkâ lək̲albāʾדְּהִכָּהלְכַלְבָּא that bit the cat dənāšak̲ ləšûnərāʾדְּנָשַׁ that at the goat dəʾāk̲al ləg̲ad̲yāʾדְּאָכַללְגַדְיָא that my father bought dizb̲an ʾabbāʾ bit̲rê zûzêדִּזְבַןאַבָּאבִּתְרֵיזוּזֵי for two zuzim. One little goat, one ḥad̲ gad̲yāʾ ḥad̲ gad̲yāʾחַדגַּדְיָאחַדגַּדְיָא little goat The angel of death wəʾăt̲āʾ malʾak̲וְאֲתָאמַלְאַ came hammāwet̲ and slaughtered the wəšāḥaṭ ləšôḥēṭוְשָׁחַטלְשׁ butcher that slaughtered the ox dəšāḥaṭ lət̲ôrāʾדְּשָׁחַטלְת that drank the water dəšāt̲āʾ ləmayyāʾדְּשָׁתָאלְמַיָּא that put out the fire dək̲āb̲â lənûrāʾדְּכָבָהלְנוּרָא that burned the stick dəśārap̲ ləḥûṭərāʾדְּשָׂרַףלְחוּטְרָא that bit the dog dəhikkâ lək̲albāʾדְּהִכָּהלְכַלְבָּא that bit the cat dənāšak̲ ləšûnərāʾדְּנָשַׁ that at the goat dəʾāk̲al ləg̲ad̲yāʾדְּאָכַללְגַדְיָא that my father bought dizb̲an ʾabbāʾ bit̲rê zûzêדִּזְבַןאַבָּאבִּתְרֵיזוּזֵי for two zuzim. One little goat, one ḥad̲ gad̲yāʾ ḥad̲ gad̲yāʾחַדגַּדְיָאחַדגַּדְיָא little goat Then the Holy One, wəʾăt̲āʾ haqqād̲ôš bārûk̲וְאֲתָאהַקָּד Blessed be He, came hûʾהוּא and slaughtered the wəšāḥaṭ ləmalʾak̲וְשָׁחַטלְמַלְאַ angel of death hammāwet̲
